tagline: Two pilgrims. 500 miles. One long walk to Santiago.
routeDescription: Saint-Jean-Pied-de-Port, France → Santiago de Compostela, Spain
intro: Welcome, friends and family! This year we're lacing up our boots and walking the Camino de Santiago — an ancient 500-mile pilgrimage route across the Pyrenees and clear across northern Spain. We'll post stories and photos here whenever we can find wifi (and a café con leche). Follow along below to get an email whenever there's news from the trail. Buen Camino!
